{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the purpose of the `enumerate` function in Python?",
      "options": ["A) To get the index of an item in a list", "B) To get the value of an item in a list", "C) To iterate over a list with index and value", "D) To get the length of a list"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "The enumerate function in Python returns a tuple containing a count (from start which defaults to 0) and the values obtained from iterating over the sequence."
